title: Text Display✨
description: Add Icons Above Games! Make Billboards! Make Graffiti! The Future Of Minecraft Text
body:
# Features
- PlaceholderAPI Support ✅
- Minimessage styling "<color>" ✅
- Unlimited displays ✅
- Easy To learn ✅
- Discord support ✅
- Free ✅

Main Command:
/textdisplay
